title: First Encounter
observation: When I first saw her, she was sparkling through the crowd of unknown people, being spicy and great.
details: she stood out from everyone around
energy felt magnetic and impossible to ignore
first visual contact stayed in memory instantly

title: Beer Acceptance
observation: I saw her accepting my beer in the bar, first time, I thought - wow, she is great and can accept it
conclusion: Initial interaction succeeded and opened the door for further communication.

title: First Long Conversation
observation: A couple of hours later, I was talking with her, mesmerized by the smile and her energy slipping out my kinks to check if she is good, but my god she was fine.
details: I was internally checking if she was genuinely this good
conclusion: Emotional and conversational chemistry escalated quickly.

title: Lingua Cafe Jealousy
observation: In lingua caffee, she was talking with some guys, I was a bit jealous, even though she wasn't mine.
details: internal conflict between logic and feelings
desire for her attention became noticeable
conclusion: Feelings became deeper than casual interest.

title: The Leap of Faith
observation: We went for a date, talked openly, and I took a leap of faith and wanted her to be mine by being bold in physical actions, she loved it and then, it became a real start to us.
details: fear of scaring her away disappeared
she accepted my interests and personality fully
physical confidence created a turning point
conclusion: Relationship officially transitioned into something real.

title: First Night Together
observation: Honestly, I remember how I was nervous coming to her place, but she was so fricking kind to accept me who and how I am.
details: she created a feeling of safety immediately
sleeping together felt peaceful and intimate
conclusion: Trust and comfort were established deeply.

title: Tallinn Holiday Period
observation: We cooked some vegan food, she was so lovely, warm, I wanted her to be so close.
details: I wanted to become better for her
conclusion: Feelings evolved into emotional attachment and devotion.

title: Jazz Incident
observation: She told, that jazz is not her thing, but she still introduced me with some jazz+rock remix.
details: still tried to share music with me
humor became part of the relationship
conclusion: Differences became playful rather than problematic.

title: Concert and Club Night
observation: We went to a club, where after some time she took care of me on way back home, when I was vulnerable as hell and we ate some juicy burgers.
details: she showed care during vulnerable moment
late-night burgers became part of the memory
conclusion: Her care during vulnerability strengthened the relationship significantly.

title: Dreamlike April
observation: All April was like a huge dream, me studying, coming back to her and be loved.
details: anime, series and physical closeness created comfort
returning to her felt like home
May felt calmer but emotionally stronger
conclusion: Relationship integrated into everyday life naturally.

title: Character Analysis
observation: She is smart, beautiful, spicy, kinky, kind and empathetic to others.
details: motivates me during studies and work
feels both strong and cute simultaneously
conclusion: Admiration expanded beyond attraction into genuine love.

title: Beer Preferences
observation: Weird is that she only likes lager, not even white beer, but that is okay.
details: became another playful detail about her
did not affect attraction levels whatsoever
conclusion: Small differences became part of her charm.

title: Anime Validation
observation: She watched anime series with me that I adored aaand she liked them, that means to me a lot.

title: Sleepy Gremlin State
observation: She is so funny, when she is sleepy, like a gremlin that needs some fun.
details: her humor feels natural and adorable
desire to experience more of these moments
conclusion: Affection extends deeply into everyday imperfections.

title: Emotional Strength
observation: She is trying so hard to do great to me. She went through so much during her life, but she is strong.
details: I sometimes question if I deserve her
she continues trying despite her past struggles
conclusion: Love is reinforced by empathy, resilience and care.

title: Future Coop Gaming
observation: Now I want to play with her in some coop games.
details: possible PS5 or Xbox sessions imagined together
conclusion: Future experiences together are actively imagined and desired.

title: Personal History Sharing
observation: She told me her story, about mom, her health, her relationship with Leah.
details: deep trust was placed in me
I want to remember everything about her
her honesty made me value her even more
conclusion: Emotional connection reached deeply personal level.

title: Final Realization
details: all experiences led to this conclusion
